text:
0 = Does not apply - I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past 5 days
1 = Rarely or not at all 
2 = Occasionally 
3 = Frequently 
4 = Almost constantly 
8 = Unable to answer 
^ = Blank
520 PAIN_DAY_DAY_ADMSN_CD PAIN_DAY_DAY_ADMSN_CD Pain interference with DTD activities (Adm) CHAR 1 This column document, at the time of admission, how often, in the past five days, day-to-day activities (excluding rehabilitation therapy sessions) were limited because of pain? 1 = Rarely or not at all
